title: clermontia grandiflora var. longifolia
intro: Clermontia grandiflora var. longifolia, also known as the Hawaiian hibiscus or long-leaved clermontia, is a flowering plant native to the Hawaiian Islands. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Clermontia grandiflora var. longifolia include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as having antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from the flowers and leaves, which can be used in teas, infusions, and tinctures.
